utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: If I were omnipotent for a day , I would want , um , world peace , no more hunger , good things for the rain ... forest ... And bigger boobs !

emotion_cause.span: 3_If I were omnipotent for a day , I would want , um , world peace , no more hunger , good things for the rain ... forest ... And bigger boobs !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yeah , see ... you took mine . Chandler , what about you ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Uh , if I were omnipotent for a day , I would ... make myself omnipotent forever .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: See , there is always one guy . " If I had a wish , I would wish for three more wishes . "

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Hey , Joey , what would you do if you were omnipotent ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hey , if Little Joey dead , then I got no reason to live !
